reason: Codex gpt-5.5 xhigh read all three deliverables and applied targeted in-place edits to context.md, reasoning.md, and answer.md (verified next-token shift alignment, prompt masking, token-average, and the unified-gradient derivation grad[-mu*KL(pi_beta||pi_theta)] = mu*E_{pi_beta}[grad log pi_theta]; tightened scaffold neutrality and removed scaffold-specific controller from the canonical trace). The wrapper process then exited 144 only because the embedded rubric text caused it to recursively spawn nested companion reviewers, which were terminated; the substantive review-and-fix completed before that and was re-verified by the calling agent (math, code faithfulness to verl _compute_loss, in-frame discipline, no source-paper references, English, no headers in reasoning.md).
